response.justification: Bogdan is a technically exceptional staff-level engineer with excellent developer tools and testing infrastructure credentials, but this role explicitly requires 2+ years of people management experience and is structured as a full-time people-leadership position. The resume shows zero demonstrated experience in team management, 1-on-1s, performance reviews, or organizational leadership—only individual technical contributions at increasingly senior levels. He would need significant ramp-up in people management fundamentals.
strengths: Deep developer tools expertise: built test runners, CI/CD infrastructure, and MCP frameworks spanning multiple companies and languages
Strong mobile platform knowledge with proven app development experience (iOS/Apple TV top-10 app at WatchUp)
Demonstrated ability to grow others through workshops, courses, and community projects despite lack of formal management experience
concerns: Zero people management experience: no evidence of leading teams, conducting reviews, or managing direct reports despite job requiring 2 years
No strategic roadmap or organizational planning demonstrated; experience is tactical/technical rather than strategic team prioritization and goal-setting
Career trajectory shows pure individual contributor path (Staff roles are technical, not management); no progression into or experience with team-scale leadership at organizations
